hero.title:
Map the World,
Drive Decisions
hero.description: Dr. Geo delivers cutting-edge geospatial solutions — from satellite imagery analysis to real-time location intelligence — empowering businesses to see further and act smarter.

highlights.title: Why Dr. Geo?
highlights.subtitle: We combine satellite data, machine learning, and decades of domain expertise to turn raw geography into actionable insight.
highlights.card1_desc: Live geospatial data streams updated every minute, keeping your operations always in sync with the ground truth.
highlights.card2_desc: Advanced algorithms detect patterns, anomalies, and trends across vast geographic datasets automatically.
highlights.card3_desc: Full-planet satellite coverage with sub-meter resolution, available on-demand for any region on Earth.

how.title: How It Works
how.subtitle: From raw data to decision-ready intelligence in three streamlined steps.
how.step1_desc: We pull in satellite feeds, sensor streams, and third-party datasets and normalize them into a unified geospatial pipeline.
how.step2_desc: Our AI models run change detection, object recognition, and spatial analytics to surface the signals that matter.
how.step3_desc: Insights are pushed to your dashboards, APIs, or alerts in real time so your teams can act without delay.

cta.title: Ready to See the World Differently?
cta.subtitle: Talk to our geospatial experts and discover how Dr. Geo can transform your data into competitive advantage.

hero.title:
Geospatial Intelligence,
Human-Led
hero.description: Dr. Geo was built by scientists, engineers, and data professionals united by a single purpose: making the Earth's complexity understandable and actionable for every organization.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Turn geography into decisions
mission.text: We exist to bridge the gap between raw spatial data and the real-world decisions that depend on it — delivering clarity at planetary scale with precision you can trust.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: A world that acts on location
vision.text: We envision a future where every organization — from a city planner to a global enterprise — has instant access to accurate, real-time geospatial intelligence.

values.title: What We Stand For
values.subtitle: Our values aren't a poster on the wall. They shape every algorithm, every data pipeline, and every conversation with our clients.
values.value1_desc: We never trade accuracy for speed. Our models are validated against ground truth before any result reaches a customer.
values.value2_desc: We invest heavily in R&D to stay ahead of satellite technology, ML advances, and the evolving needs of our clients.
values.value3_desc: Behind every data point is a human decision. We design tools that empower teams, not replace them.
values.value4_desc: We hold ourselves to strict ethical standards on data privacy, environmental impact, and transparent AI practices.
values.value5_desc: We embed with our clients' teams, understand their constraints, and measure success by their outcomes — not ours.

team.title: The Team Behind the Maps
team.subtitle: A multidisciplinary crew of geographers, data scientists, engineers, and domain specialists spread across four continents.
team.member1_bio: Former NASA JPL researcher with 15 years in remote sensing and spatial analytics.
team.member2_bio: Led satellite data pipelines at Planet Labs before founding Dr. Geo's engineering org.
team.member3_bio: PhD in computational geography; published 30+ papers on geospatial deep learning.
team.member4_bio: 10 years building B2B data products at scale, focused on turning complexity into simple UX.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.subtitle: A decade of building the infrastructure that powers location intelligence for the world's most demanding organizations.
timeline.tl1_desc: Dr. Geo starts as a two-person research spinout from USP, focused on agricultural land-use classification.
timeline.tl2_desc: Secured a 3-year deal with a top-5 agribusiness firm to monitor deforestation across 12M hectares.
timeline.tl3_desc: Released the Dr. Geo SaaS platform — the first self-serve geospatial intelligence product for mid-market teams.
timeline.tl4_desc: Opened offices in Amsterdam and Singapore; grew to 80 employees and 80+ active enterprise clients.
timeline.tl5_desc: Shipped our fully AI-native ingestion and analysis pipeline, cutting time-to-insight from days to minutes.

cta.title: Want to Build the Future of Location Intelligence?
cta.subtitle: Whether you're a potential partner, client, or the next great hire — we'd love to hear from you.

hero.title:
Geospatial Services
Built for Scale
hero.description: From raw satellite ingestion to decision-ready dashboards, Dr. Geo provides the full stack of location intelligence services your organization needs to move faster and see further.

offerings.title: Our Services
offerings.subtitle: Six specialized capabilities — deployable independently or as an integrated platform.
offerings.svc1_desc: Automated processing of multispectral and SAR satellite scenes for land-cover classification, vegetation indices, and urban change detection.
offerings.svc2_desc: Continuous geospatial data streams with sub-minute latency, configurable alert thresholds, and live situational awareness dashboards.
offerings.svc3_desc: Deep learning models that automatically flag anomalies, deforestation events, infrastructure changes, and natural disaster impacts across any region.
offerings.svc4_desc: Spatial optimization of supply chains, last-mile delivery networks, and field operations using live traffic, terrain, and risk data.
offerings.svc5_desc: RESTful and streaming APIs that integrate satellite data, geocoding, reverse geocoding, and spatial analytics directly into your existing stack.
offerings.svc6_desc: Tailored geospatial dashboards and automated PDF/CSV reports calibrated to your KPIs, updated on any cadence you need.

features.title: Platform Deep Dives
features.subtitle: Two capabilities that set Dr. Geo apart from every other geospatial vendor.
features.feat1_title: A Unified API for the Entire Earth
features.feat1_desc: Our unified geospatial API abstracts away satellite providers, coordinate systems, and projection complexities — so your developers query Earth like a database.
features.feat1_b3: SDKs for Python, JavaScript, and Go
features.feat2_title: Models Trained on Decades of Ground Truth
features.feat2_desc: Our AI models are trained and continuously fine-tuned on validated ground-truth datasets, achieving industry-leading accuracy across biomes, climates, and geographies.
features.feat2_b2: Detects changes as small as 0.1 hectares

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Scale up or down as your needs evolve. All plans include a 14-day free trial.
pricing.plan1_desc: Perfect for teams exploring geospatial intelligence for the first time.
pricing.plan2_desc: For growing organizations that need production-grade geospatial at scale.
pricing.plan3_desc: Full-platform access, dedicated infrastructure, and white-glove onboarding.

cta.title: Not Sure Which Plan Fits?
cta.subtitle: Talk to our solutions team. We'll map out exactly what you need — no overselling, no lock-in.

hero.title:
Let's Build Something
Together
hero.description: Have a project in mind, a question about our platform, or just want to explore what geospatial intelligence could do for your organization? We'd love to hear from you.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.subtitle: We typically respond within one business day.
form.subject: What's this about?
form.message_placeholder: Tell us about your project, timeline, or any questions you have…
form.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch within one business day.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the questions we hear most often.
faq.faq1_a: Yes — all plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required. You get full access to the platform during the trial.
faq.faq2_q: How quickly can we get onboarded?
faq.faq2_a: Most teams are fully onboarded within 48 hours. Enterprise clients with custom requirements typically take 1–2 weeks.
faq.faq3_a: On-premises and private cloud deployments are available on our Command (Enterprise) plan. Contact sales for architecture details.
faq.faq4_q: What satellite constellations do you support?
faq.faq4_a: We ingest data from 12+ constellations including Sentinel-2, Landsat, Planet Labs, Maxar, and several commercial SAR providers.
faq.faq5_q: Can I use my own AI models?
faq.faq5_a: Yes. The platform supports BYO model deployment via our SDK. We also offer fine-tuning services on your labeled datasets.
faq.faq6_a: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We are SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant. Your data is never shared or used to train shared models.
